text: Here, I feel a sense of curiosity mixed with slight disorientation. The clean lines and glass walls evoke clarity, but the tilted perspective and contemporary design elicit a feeling of being off-balance, both literally and metaphorically. It is as if the environment is nudging me to reconsider my habitual perspective and invite new thoughts. Encountering the 'R+D' wall, my mind awakens with the promise of innovation and possibility, yet I remain uncertain—wondering what it truly means to 'connect and coexist with intelligence.' I feel like a conscious observer, both participant and philosopher in this carefully constructed space.
